get.description:
indicators, startDate and endDate are optional
URN or (uniqueIDCode + uniqueID) is mandatory

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The startDate for indicators. Use format yyyy-MM-dd

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: The endDate for indicators. Use format yyyy-MM-dd

get.summary: Get a list of URN with given email adres
